description_long: This is a classic city bicycle with a light blue frame and beige accents, including a standard saddle and handlebar grips. The frame features a traditional diamond geometry, with thin metal tubing and a horizontal top tube. Both wheels are large, with thin tires and silver spokes, and the bicycle is equipped with front and rear fenders for protection against splashes. The handlebars are swept back in a cruiser style, providing an upright and comfortable riding position. A chain guard partially covers the chain, and a small red reflector is mounted at the rear. The pedals are flat and metallic, and there is no visible basket or rack attached to the frame.
description: A light blue city bicycle with beige saddle and grips, swept-back handlebars, and classic diamond frame. Features include fenders, a chain guard, and no basket or rack.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full diamond frame, both wheels, beige saddle, swept-back handlebars, and fenders.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width and curve of the handlebars, narrow profile of the frame, and front fender.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chain guard, pedals, and rear reflector, with clear visibility of the frame and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the saddle, rear fender, and reflector, with the frame and wheel alignment visible.
